name: harness-engineering
description: Extended PDCA(Plan→Design→Do→Check→Wrap-up) based AI software development automation plugin. Provides systematic development workflows with 6 specialized agents (strategist, architect, engineer, guardian, librarian, debugger) and 13 execution skills. Features L0-L4 automation levels, multi-framework test runner, 4-tier verification classes, wave execution, and hash-anchored edits.
